meaning: n.[天主教]忏悔,苦修vt.使...以苦行赎罪
examples: She regards living in New York as a penance; she hates big cities.
Of penance, I have had enough!
It is not mortification, a penance.
She's the priest in this movie, on hand to offer benediction, forgiveness and ultimately penance.
She found something saintly and crazed in his undertaking, an element of self-denial, an element of penance.
